prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 ultra-detailed cinematic anime cosplay illustration of a magical steampunk idol avatar flying high above a futuristic city at night, seen from an extreme wide-angle selfie perspective as if she is reaching toward the viewer with one hand in the foreground. She wears an ornate purple and white magician costume inspired by a stage-show ringmaster: a very tall deep-purple top hat with a leather belt, metal buckle, gears, and brass ornaments; long flowing silver-white hair blown dramatically by wind; purple detached sleeves with gold filigree trim; a frilly low-cut bodice with lace, ribbons, a large purple bow at the neck, star charm necklace, layered white ruffled skirt, garters, and glossy thigh-high stockings. Add exactly three glowing magical circle sigils: one large blue-white sigil near the bottom foreground, one purple-blue sigil to the right behind her, and one smaller floating portal-like sigil at the upper left, all filled with concentric rings, runes, pentagram geometry, and radiant neon light trails spiraling around her body. The background is a vast aerial cityscape full of blue and violet skyscraper lights, clouds far below, a starry sky and visible Milky Way, with a few meteor streaks. Use dramatic motion blur on the closest hand, dynamic foreshortening, luminous rim lighting, glossy fabric highlights, particles, sparks, and a high-fantasy sci-fi atmosphere. Place a flat opaque muted gray-purple square directly over the character’s face, centered and covering the entire face area, while leaving hair, hat, neck bow, and outfit visible. Color palette: deep purple, electric blue, white, silver, and gold. Render in polished gpt-image-2 anime-realism style, highly detailed, sharp subject, magical glow, no watermark, no readable text except abstract runes.
